normalized_title: City of Fremantle Local Planning Policy 2.13 - Sustainable Buildings Design Requirements
scope_summary: Requires new development in the City of Fremantle requiring planning approval to demonstrate a minimum 4 Star Green Star rating (or certified equivalent such as a One Planet Living Action Plan). Applies City-wide under Local Planning Scheme No. 4 but expressly excludes development subject to SPP 7.3 Residential Design Codes (Volumes 1 and 2), industrial use classes, development under 1000 m2 GLA, most refurbishments, minor development, and areas with their own higher sustainability standards. Compliance is secured via conditions requiring Green Star documentation before building permit and before occupation.

key_numeric_standards.applies_to: all development subject to the policy
development below this GLA is exempt from the policy

cross_references.cited: State Planning Policy 7.3 - Residential Design Codes Volume 1
State Planning Policy 7.3 - Residential Design Codes Volume 2
Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015
